topic: Deep Research — Disciplining, Commodifying, and Demystifying Software Process for an AI-Conductor
content_preview: Direct audit of the meta-organvm ecosystem mapped to canonical SDLC phases. Identifies strengths (schema-driven governance, automated dependency validation) and gaps (source-of-truth drift, naming uniformity). Proposes hybrid methodology (Kanban + Scrum-lite + DevOps + DDD + SRE), Score→Rehearse→Perform 3-ritual loop, tier-based testing matrices, DORA/flow/governance metrics, automated enforcement, and prioritized productization roadmap with Gantt timeline.
